lesson_metadata.title: Lesson: 1.9 Quiz
lesson_metadata.content:
Lesson Title: 1.9 Quiz Description:

Take the quiz below. You must pass the quiz with a score of at least 80% before you can move on to the next module. You can take the quiz up to six times. As you complete each item select "submit" to see if your answer was correct and to show the correct answer. Then move on to the next quiz question. After you complete the last question, you will receive a score. If you pass the quiz, you will be able to advance to the next module. If you do not pass the first time, you should go back over the content in the module to review any information you may have missed, and then take the quiz again.

Type: quiz Icon: Quiz
